Features

Everything You Need In One App

Every feature a shop owner needs — from making a sale to taking a daily backup.

🛒
POS — Quick Sale
Select a product, enter the quantity, and complete the sale in seconds. Works for both cash and credit customers — and prints a receipt too.
Starter + above
📓
Credit Book — Khata
Track every customer's credit balance with a dedicated ledger. See exactly who owes what — and send WhatsApp payment reminders in one tap.
Pro + above
📦
Inventory Management
Add products, track stock levels and get low-stock alerts automatically. Use the barcode scanner to update inventory in an instant.
Pro + above
🏭
Supplier & Purchases
Add suppliers and record every purchase. Track supplier balances and invoices in one place — no more guesswork in your accounts.
Pro + above
📈
Smart Reports
Profit & Loss, Stock Report, Customer Balance, Expense Report — daily, weekly, monthly filter. Har decision data se karo.
Enterprise only
☁️
Backup & Restore
Back up locally or to Google Drive and your data is always safe. Switch phones anytime and restore everything — you'll never lose a record.
All plans
How It Works

Up and Running in 4 Simple Steps

Start on day one — no technical experience required.

1
Download the App
Available on Android and iOS. Or let us install it for you.
2
Set Up Your Shop
Enter your shop name, currency and PIN — just once. Ready in 3 minutes.
3
Add Your Products
Scan a barcode or add products manually. You can even attach photos.
4
Start Selling!
Make sales, track credit, view reports — everything works smarter now!

What We Offer

The Complete Shop App — Explained

One powerful app that handles every part of running your shop — sales, stock, credit, suppliers, expenses and reporting.

🛒
Point of Sale (POS)
Ring up sales in seconds. Select products, enter quantity, choose cash or credit — and hand the customer a receipt. Works fully offline.
CashCreditReceipts
📒
Credit Ledger (Khata)
Every customer gets their own ledger. Track who owes what, view full history, and send WhatsApp payment reminders in one tap.
UdhaarRemindersHistory
📦
Stock Management
Add products by barcode scan or manually. Get low-stock alerts before you run out. Categories keep everything organized.
BarcodeAlertsCategories
🏭
Supplier Management
Record every purchase from every supplier. Track outstanding balances, invoices and payment history — never lose track of a supplier bill.
InvoicesPurchasesBalance
📊
Smart Reports
Daily, weekly and monthly Profit & Loss, Stock Value, Expense Summaries and Customer Balances. Real data for real decisions.
P&LExpensesFilters
☁️
Backup & Security
PIN-protected app access. One-tap local backup. Auto daily Google Drive backup on Enterprise — switch phones without losing a single record.
PIN LockGoogle DriveOffline

A complete, on-site Enterprise Resource Planning system — installed on your PCs, managed by our team. Built for marts, pharmacies, and growing organizations across Pakistan.

Full POS billing, inventory, multi-cashier, customer ledger and supplier management in one place.

Medicine inventory with batch & expiry tracking, distributor accounts, and automated low-stock alerts.

Advanced Inventory

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Does the app work without internet?
+
Absolutely! Dukan Daftar works completely offline. No internet? No problem — sales, credit, stock management all work normally. Everything syncs automatically when you reconnect. Even during power outages and load-shedding, your app keeps running.
Can everything run on a single phone?
+
Yes! It works perfectly on a single Android phone. Budget phones like Infinix and Tecno are fully supported. For a bigger screen, you can use a tablet as well.
How does the barcode scanner work?
+
On Pro and Enterprise plans, your phone's camera becomes the barcode scanner — no extra hardware needed. Scan a product barcode and the stock updates instantly. Enterprise users can also connect a dedicated hardware scanner for even faster scanning.
What if I lose my data?
+
Don't worry — all data is stored locally on your phone. You can take a local backup at any time. Enterprise plan users get an automatic daily backup to Google Drive while they sleep. Even if your phone breaks, your data stays safe.
Do you provide training?
+
Of course! Basic training is included with every plan. Enterprise customers get full onboarding — for you and your entire staff. WhatsApp support is available 24/7 for any questions along the way.
Which printers are supported?
+
On the Enterprise plan, both Bluetooth and USB thermal receipt printers are supported. Popular brands like EPSON, Sunmi and iDPRT all work. We'll recommend the right hardware and handle the full setup — you don't need to do a thing.

🏆 Ciontek CS30 · Professional Grade
Ciontek CS30 Smart POS
سیونٹیک CS30 — پروفیشنل اسمارٹ ٹرمینل
If you're serious about your business, this is your device. The Ciontek CS30 is slim enough to hold all day (just 17mm thin!), yet powerful enough to run a busy store without breaking a sweat. The Zebra scanner reads barcodes even in dim light — perfect for warehouses and large stores.

اگر آپ کا کاروبار بڑا ہے — یہ آپ کی ڈیوائس ہے۔ صرف 17mm پتلی، لیکن طاقت میں کسی سے کم نہیں۔ زیبرا سکینر کم روشنی میں بھی کام کرتا ہے۔
